news.summary: In the town of Mt. Hope, Ohio, on May 15, 2025, Genie®, a renowned pioneer in garage door openers and home security solutions, unveiled its latest cutting-edge development: a residential linear actuator gate. Designed to be smart, long-lasting, and optimized for real-world functionality, this innovation is set to transform the market. Stay tuned for more exciting surprises from Genie® in the near future.
news.headline: Genie® unveils new linear actuator gate operator for residential use, promising smart and durable performance.

news.summary: In New York on May 15, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm focusing on investor rights, has initiated investigations into various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and/or fiduciary duties to shareholders. The investigation includes LENSAR, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNSR), examining its sale transaction.
news.headline: Investigator Halper Sadeh LLC probes LNSR, DNB, and BRDG for shareholder concerns on alleged violations.

news.summary: San Francisco, May 15, 2025 - Planful Inc., a leading provider of financial performance management cloud software, unveiled a range of innovations aimed at enhancing efficiency for teams. This includes the introduction of persona-based AI assistants, along with improvements in consolidations, workforce planning, and integrations. These new capabilities are designed to assist teams in automating routine tasks and optimizing their financial processes.
news.headline: Planful unveils AI innovations aiming to aid CFOs with talent shortages: Persona-Based AI Assistants, Consolidations, Workforce Planning.

news.summary: In the latest updates, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has significantly increased to 7.9%, with a total of 12.6 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the GDP has dropped by 4.3% in the last quarter, marking a substantial decrease in economic growth. The stock market has also experienced a decline of 600 points, causing concerns among investors. It is evident that the economy is facing challenges due to the ongoing pandemic, leading to financial instability for many individuals and businesses.Experts are closely monitoring the situation, while government officials are working on implementing strategies to address these issues and revive the economy. With the future uncertain, it is crucial for stakeholders to collaborate and take necessary steps to mitigate the damaging impacts of the crisis.
news.headline: JPMorgan CEO Dimon shows emotions on work-from-home comments.

news.summary: Amidst tariff volatility in traditional markets, executives like Ridhima Kahn of Dapper Labs are leveraging blockchain to explore digital markets. Brands are turning to digital collectibles with NFT sales seeing a 7% increase quarter-over-quarter, reaching $2.5 million for NFL All Day and $5.6 million for NBA Top Shot. The total value locked on Flow is at an all-time high of $44.4 million, indicating a broader blockchain application. Enhanced onramping technology has facilitated user experiences, aiding blockchain adoption. With clearer regulation, blockchain is gaining trust, especially among well-known brands. Companies are excelling in fan engagement through IP-backed digital collections. The rise of digital goods offers a globalized, personalized, and valuable user experience, distinct from physical goods. The shift towards digital engagement is predicted to continue as consumers seek utility and unique experiences in the digital space.
news.headline: Tariff upheaval prompts NFL, NBA to boost digital merch. NBA Top Shot at $5.6M, NFL All Day at $2.5M. Total value locked at $44.4M on Flow.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global population has surpassed 7.8 billion people. The COVID-19 pandemic has caused over 200 million cases and 4.5 million deaths worldwide. In economic news, the stock market saw a 2% increase, reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Additionally, the unemployment rate has fallen to 5%, with 10 million jobs added in the last quarter. Finally, the average price of gasoline has risen to $3.00 per gallon, leading to concerns about inflation.
news.headline: JPMorgan CEO expresses frustration about remote work in a statement, acknowledging emotional response.

The market value of the Battery Disconnect Unit (BDU) was recorded at USD 3657 million in 2024, and it is estimated to achieve a significant increase, reaching a projected...

news.summary: Latest addition to Midland's premium external speaker line, the SPKMINI, has been introduced to complement the existing SPK100 and SPK200 models. Promising exceptional audio performance and clear sound quality even in noisy settings, the SPKMINI is set to elevate user experience. This update was unveiled by Midland in KANSAS CITY, Mo. on May 15, 2025. As a notable player in two-way radio communication tech, Midland continues to enhance its product range, catering to the growing demand for reliable and high-quality audio accessories.
news.headline: Midland launches compact mini speaker SPKMINI for clear communication in loud environments, joining SPK100 and SPK200.

news.summary: In Roswell, Georgia on May 15, 2025, BUDS Technology Inc., a prominent company specializing in AI-driven healthcare products, has unveiled the rebranding of its primary virtual medical assistant app. The application previously identified as Nurse Daisy, will now be recognized by a new name. This change comes into effect immediately, marking a significant transformation for the well-known product.
news.headline: BUDS Technology Inc. changes name of virtual medical assistant from "Nurse Daisy" to "AKSSI," expands into senior living market.

news.summary: Today in Strasbourg, France, the shareholders of Transgene gathered for the Combined Ordinary and Extraordinary General Meeting. The meeting took place at the company's headquarters located at 400 boulevard Gonthier d’Andernach in Illkirch-Graffenstaden, France. The meeting started at 10:00 a.m. on May 15, 2025, and key decisions were made during the gathering.
news.headline: Transgene held its Combined General Meeting on May 15, 2025 in France.

news.summary: The stock of Intuitive Surgical experienced a drop on Thursday following the announcement that CEO Gary Guthart will be resigning on July 1. This unexpected news saw the robotic surgery company's shares decline. The departure of Guthart came as a surprise, prompting a negative reaction in the market. The specific percentage drop in stock value was not provided, but it was significant enough to make headlines in Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Intuitive Surgical's stock falls as CEO Guthart steps down, effective July 1.

news.summary: President Donald Trump expressed his dissatisfaction to Apple CEO Tim Cook regarding the company's choice to increase iPhone production in India. Trump voiced his concerns to Cook, indicating that he is displeased with the decision. The move to shift more of the iPhone production to India has apparently raised objections from the president.
news.headline: Trump unhappy with Apple moving more iPhone production to India. Post by Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Workhorse Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WKHS) saw a decline in shares as they reported first-quarter results. The company posted a quarterly loss of $4.68 per share, falling short of the expected $3.44 per share loss. Sales for the quarter came in at $640,920, missing the anticipated $2.35 million. This decrease from $1.34 million was primarily attributed to the Aero divestiture and decreased sales of W4 CC and W56 trucks. During the three months ending on March 31, an institutional investor converted $5.9 million of principal into common stock. Additionally, the company recorded a $3.3 million fair...
news.headline: Workhorse's stock falls after Q1 miss, plans to cut workforce to reduce cash burn. Quarterly sales drop to $640,920 from $1.34 million.

news.summary: A new announcement from PackIt reveals the introduction of two new products in their collection of ice-free soft cooler bags. The Newport Cooler and the 12-Can Tote Cooler are the latest additions designed with PackIt's unique ECOFREEZE® Technology. The release comes ahead of the summer season in Agoura Hills, California, on May 15, 2025. These additions aim to provide enhanced cooling solutions with the convenience of patented technology for users preparing for outdoor activities or travel.
news.headline: PackIt® introduces two new coolers for summer: Newport Cooler and 12-Can Tote Cooler with ECOFREEZE® Technology.

news.summary: A new report titled "Wind Turbine Materials Market, Global, 2024-2031" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report categorizes the wind turbine materials market into structural and non-structural materials. Structural materials are further divided into metals, fiber-reinforced composites, and core materials, whereas non-structural materials include coatings, adhesives and sealants, and lubricants. The market for each type of material has been segmented for analysis.
news.headline: Global Wind Turbine Materials Market 2024-2031 report from ResearchAndMarkets.com focuses on improving product technologies, indicating a transformational growth. Market divided into structural/non-structural materials. Structural materials include metals, fiber-reinforced composites, and core materials; non-structural materials consist of coatings, adhesives and sealants, and lubricants.

news.summary: In Chicago, ComEd and the American Society of Mechanical Engineers (ASME) are hosting an event to wrap up the fourth year of the ASME DropMEin! program. This initiative aims to promote STEM education by bringing over 100 elementary school students to the Chicago Training Center. The program involves engineers and STEM professionals visiting classrooms to enrich the curriculum and motivate students to pursue STEM careers. This year's event is part of a broader effort to inspire the future STEM workforce in Illinois.
news.headline: ASME & ComEd host STEM program for over 100 fifth and sixth graders in Chicago, inspiring future workforce. #STEMeducation

news.summary: UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE: UNH) stock is facing a decline following a media report detailing a potential criminal Medicare fraud investigation. The Wall Street Journal revealed that the Justice Department's healthcare-fraud unit has been actively investigating the company since at least last summer. UnitedHealth acknowledged being part of various governmental investigations in its latest annual securities filing, without specifying the criminal, civil, and antitrust probes reported by the Journal. The company denied receiving official notification from the Department of Justice regarding the alleged criminal investigation. For more details, see the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: UnitedHealth stock falls on possible criminal Medicare fraud investigation by the Justice Department. Company denies official notice from DOJ.

news.summary: Dunkerque's Aluminium plant has achieved a significant advancement in its eco-friendly plan by unveiling Furnace 8, its initial unit exclusively for aluminium recycling. This new addition boosts its production capacity by 20,000 tonnes annually. The inauguration took place in Loon-Plage, France on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Aluminium Dunkerque inaugurates Furnace 8 for recycling, adding 20,000 tonnes/year to production capacity.

news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company based in South Korea, Rznomics Inc., is collaborating on precision RNA therapeutics for treating inherited hearing loss. The announcement was made on May 15, 2025. Their joint efforts aim to develop innovative solutions for addressing this condition.
news.headline: Rznomics partners with Eli Lilly for RNA-editing therapeutics, focusing on precision treatments for inherited hearing loss.

news.summary: Steven Galanis, co-founder and CEO of Cameo, has unveiled a new podcast called Zeitgeist on May 15, 2025. This podcast will delve into the journeys of brands that have successfully penetrated cultural phenomena, rather than merely attracting customers. Cameo, founded by Galanis, has paved its way into the industry spotlight with this venture. Stay tuned for insightful discussions on how these brands managed to break into culture.
news.headline: Cameo CEO Steven Galanis launches Zeitgeist podcast exploring brand success stories.

news.summary: In its second year, a campaign targeting the winemaking community is set to begin in New York on May 15, 2025. With a focus on enhancing its image and engaging stakeholders, the initiative will feature signature events, promotions, and educational programs. Aimed at modernizing perceptions and garnering support, the campaign seeks to involve a larger audience by showcasing the industry's offerings.
news.headline: Bordeaux Wines starts second global campaign, #JointheBordeauxCrew, with events, promotions, and education.

news.summary: An Iowa-based company, Lil’ Drug Store Products, Inc. has been acknowledged as one of the best-managed companies in the United States. This recognition highlights the exceptional management and operational practices of the company. The award serves as a testament to the company's dedication to excellence and innovation in its industry. This achievement further solidifies the company's position as a leading entity in the business world.
news.headline: Lil' Drug Store Products, Inc. in Cedar Rapids named a US Best Managed Company.

news.summary: In a recent collaboration announcement, Porter Brown Associates and The Headcount have revealed their strategic partnership aimed at providing comprehensive business diversity solutions. This initiative comes in response to the changing landscape of business diversity management and compliance reporting. The partnership, unveiled in Atlanta on May 15, 2025, signifies a move towards enhancing diversity practices in businesses. The joint effort will offer a range of services to assist companies in navigating diversity requirements, with a focus on improving compliance standards. This alliance is seen as a significant step forward in addressing the increasing need for diversity in the corporate sector.
news.headline: Porter Brown Associates and The Headcount partner for business diversity solutions. ATLANTA, May 15, 2025 /PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.summary: The State Collection Service was instrumental in raising awareness about policy concerns related to reporting medical debt on credit reports. They devoted significant leadership and resources to help lawmakers and regulators comprehend the rule's practical effects on healthcare delivery and provider financial stability. Their efforts focused on highlighting key numbers related to medical debt and its impact on the industry.
news.headline: CFPB withdraws ban on medical debt credit reporting after industry advocacy; State Collection Service played key role.

news.summary: A California-based company called Rightful Returns Group is dedicated to helping people reclaim lost financial assets. Their focus is on reconnecting clients with dormant funds, using specialized investigative techniques and comprehensive administrative support. By leveraging their expertise, the firm helps individuals recover forgotten financial resources efficiently and effectively.
news.headline: California firm, Rightful Returns Group, excels in reconnecting clients with dormant financial assets through expert processes.

news.summary: Outro, founded by a renowned expert in 'deprescribing' psychiatric medications, has recently launched its services in seven states: New York, California, Colorado, Texas, Florida, Washington, and Illinois. The company offers access to lower doses of medications that are not typically found in regular pharmacies or from pharmaceutical companies.
news.headline: Outro, a digital clinic for tapering off antidepressants, launched in 7 U.S. states including NY, CA, CO, TX, FL, WA, IL.

news.summary: Today, in Long Beach, California, the Certified Manufactured Home Specialist program was officially launched on May 15, 2025. This designation equips real estate agents with specialized knowledge and tools to establish a unique presence in the manufactured housing market. The program aims to help agents tap into this sector by providing them with the necessary expertise. This initiative offers agents opportunities to differentiate themselves by focusing on the distinctive niche market of manufactured homes.
news.headline: New Certified Manufactured Home Specialist designation meets demand in the market. Launched in Long Beach on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In recent news, NextHome agents have joined forces with a new partner to provide sellers the opportunity to access up to $50,000 in home improvement funds payable at the close of the sale. This collaboration aims to streamline the process of preparing listings for the market, eliminating any upfront costs for sellers. The announcement was made in Stamford, Conn., on May 15, 2025. Notable, a prominent player in pay-at-close home improvement financing, facilitated this strategic alliance.
news.headline: NextHome partners with Notable for "NextHome Refresh," offering sellers up to $50,000 in pay-at-close home improvement funding.

news.summary: A prominent AI-powered equipment rental and SaaS platform, 2Quip Corporation, has revealed its acquisition of Rentz Corp, the proprietor of rentmyequipment.com, a peer-to-peer equipment rental marketplace. This acquisition is a strategic step forward in 2Quip's goal to revolutionize the $56 billion equipment industry.
news.headline: 2Quip acquires Rentz Corp, consolidating leadership in equipment rental, to transform $56 billion market.

news.summary: Freddie Mac is urging lenders to transfer cost reductions to their customers. The company's initiative aims to ensure that customers benefit from decreases in costs. By passing on these savings, lenders can offer more competitive rates to customers, ultimately leading to more affordable options for homebuyers. This move by Freddie Mac highlights the importance of prioritizing customer benefits in the lending industry.
news.headline: Freddie Mac's automated underwriting can save mortgage originators up to $1,500 per loan, encouraging passing savings to customers.

news.summary: Every 15 minutes in the United States, a newborn is delivered with Neonatal Abstinence Syndrome (NAS) due to exposure to opioids during pregnancy. This condition leads to a challenging and distressing detoxification period for the infant in the initial days post-birth. In Phoenix on May 15, 2025, Hushabye Nursery shared the positive news of The Bob & Renee Parsons Foundation's involvement...
news.headline: Hushabye Nursery gets $300,000 from The Bob & Renee Parsons Foundation to help infants with NAS in the U.S. every 15 minutes born with NAS.

news.summary: In a recent statement released on May 15, 2025, Women We Admire revealed the prestigious list of The Top 50 Women Leaders of Memphis for the year 2025. Memphis, renowned as the Home of the Blues and the origin of soul, rock'n'roll, witnessed the acknowledgment of these remarkable women for their impactful leadership. The list showcases 50 outstanding female leaders who have made a significant difference in their community. This recognition highlights the diverse talents and accomplishments of these women, emphasizing their influence in various sectors and their role in shaping the future of Memphis.
news.headline: Women We Admire names Top 50 Women Leaders of Memphis for 2025. Celebrating women's achievements.

news.summary: A company known as Ordoro has been honored as one of the top workplaces in Austin for the year 2025 by the Austin Business Journal. This recognition emphasizes the company's focus on prioritizing its team members and fostering a strong team-first culture. Based in AUSTIN, Texas, Ordoro is a prominent player in the field of eCommerce logistics and inventory management. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to creating a positive work environment and fostering a culture that values its employees.
news.headline: Ordoro named one of Austin's Best Places to Work for 2025 by Austin Business Journal. Leader in eCommerce logistics.

news.summary: In Europe, the smart harvest market is estimated to grow substantially, with projections to increase from $1.59 billion in 2024 to $3.10 billion by 2033. This would represent a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.67% during the forecast period of 2024 to 2033. The increasing adoption of advanced agricultural technologies within the region is a key factor driving this growth. The report "Europe Smart Harvest Market: Focus on Application, Product, and Country - Analysis and Forecast, 2024-2033" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, highlighting the expanding market opportunities in Europe for smart harvest solutions.
news.headline: Europe Smart Harvest Market projected to reach $3.10 billion by 2033 from $1.59 billion in 2024, growing at CAGR of 7.67%.

news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group is offering essential guidance to IT leaders in the construction industry to adapt to rapid technological progress. Their report outlines crucial tactics for integrating new technologies into their operations.
news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group releases report for construction industry on adopting tech for smarter, safer, and sustainable communities.

news.summary: Today in Grand Rapids, Michigan, on May 15, 2025, RunTogether has been unveiled as a pioneering all-in-one AI-driven platform tailored for the aid of small, local candidates in simplifying their campaign management. The platform aims to provide affordable tools that democratize the campaign process, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates. This launch marks a significant milestone as RunTogether becomes the first of its kind to offer such comprehensive support in this sector, encouraging increased participation in local politics.
news.headline: RunTogether debuts AI-powered platform for local candidates, aiding in campaign management. Launches on May 15, 2025 from Grand Rapids, Mich.

news.summary: In Lakeville, Minnesota on May 15, 2025, Post Consumer Brands employees participated in the company's fourth annual volunteer initiative, Ingredients for Good, to honor National Volunteer Month. The event brought together employees from 18 locations across the United States and Canada. In total, they contributed over 67,000 meals and snack packs as part of their volunteer efforts.
news.headline: Post Consumer Brands employees donate over 67,000 meals and snack packs for those in need across U.S. and Canada.

news.summary: A woman has been recognized for her leadership and dedication to the healthcare sector. Jennifer Harmon, Managing Director of Fingerpaint Medical in Cedar Knolls, New Jersey, has been honored as a 2025 Luminary. This award celebrates women who demonstrate exceptional leadership in the healthcare industry. This achievement was announced on May 15, 2025, by Fingerpaint Group.
news.headline: Jennifer Harmon of Fingerpaint Group wins 2025 Healthcare Businesswomen's Association Luminary Award for leadership in healthcare industry.

news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky utilities are taking action to upgrade outdated equipment in response to more frequent and severe storms. This is in order to ensure their ability to support the increased energy demands in the region. The upgrades come as a result of the uptick in extreme weather events and aim to enhance resilience. The investments are being made to protect against these storms and improve readiness for future challenges.
news.headline: LG&E and KU investing in upgrades to defend against storms and increase energy needs in Kentucky.

news.summary: In Paris and Loon-Plage, France, on May 15, 2025, Aluminium Dunkerque (AD) and EDF agreed to a 10-year electricity supply deal by signing a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU). The agreement reflects EDF's strategy to bolster its commercial initiatives by providing sustained support. The contract signifies a significant step in securing stable electricity supply for AD over the next decade.
news.headline: Aluminium Dunkerque & EDF sign a MoU for a 10-year electricity supply agreement in France. #partnership #energy
